prompt: My UI feels flat and uninteresting. Everything looks like it has the same importance. The page has a title, some stats, and a table, but nothing stands out. What's going on?
assertions: Names the visual hierarchy problem explicitly
Mentions at least two of the three hierarchy tools: font size, font weight, color/contrast
Discusses different levels of content importance (primary, secondary, tertiary)
Gives specific actionable recommendations with values (e.g., font weights 600-700, grey for secondary text)
